use_cases: Displaying user-generated social media posts in a feed layout
Showing engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares) for content platforms
Creating social proof cards for creator dashboards
Building community and forum post previews
Displaying shared content with link previews in social apps
ai_summary: A social media post card component featuring author profile info, text content with optional link preview, and engagement action buttons (like, comment, share, bookmark). The card employs a glass-morphism aesthetic with backdrop blur, semi-transparent backgrounds, rounded corners, and smooth hover transitions. Ideal for social feeds, community platforms, creator dashboards, and any application requiring user-generated content display with engagement metrics.
